text: I find myself pausing at the threshold, bidding farewell to the space that has hosted my quiet reflections. There is a sense of closure, yet also the subtle tug of curiosity as I look back at the exhibit. The soft glow and thoughtful words within evoke both comfort and longing—an awareness that every departure holds a promise of return and new questions. I feel quietly grateful to have lingered here, and faintly unsettled by the transience of each encounter.
